# 📢 Release Notes — Documentation & Platform Foundation

## Version: v0.1.0 (Foundation Release)

---

## 🚀 Overview

This release introduces the foundational documentation and structural setup for the KingKen Global Recruitment Platform.

It marks the transition from planning to a structured, scalable development environment.

---

## ✨ Highlights

* Platform scaffolding defined across CRM, AI, SaaS, and Design modules
* Introduction of centralized instructions document
* Standardized documentation and workflow guidelines
* Improved repository structure for scalability

---

## 📁 Key Additions

* `.github/instructions/v0.1.0-release-notes.md` — this release notes document
* `README.md` — project overview and getting started guide
* `ARCHITECTURE.md` — platform architecture overview
* `DEVELOPMENT.md` — development workflow guidelines
* `docs/SETUP_GUIDE.md` — environment setup guide
* `ops/ROLLOUT_CHECKLIST.md` — pre-deployment rollout checklist
* `.github/FUNDING.yml` — GitHub funding configuration

---

## 🧠 Improvements

* Enhanced contributor onboarding
* Clear development workflow
* Alignment with long-term architecture vision

---

## 🔮 Next Steps

* MVP platform implementation
* Backend and frontend system development
* Deployment and live environment setup

---

## 📌 Note

This release focuses on documentation and structure. No functional features have been deployed yet.
